name: Banana Split Cake
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Cool whip or real whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to package directions and allow it to cool.
2. Mix the dry pudding mix with cream cheese until well combined.
3. Gradually add milk, a little at a time, until the mixture is smooth.
4. Spread the pudding evenly over the cooled cake.
5. Cover the cake with drained pineapple slices.
6. Cut bananas lengthwise and arrange them over the pineapple.
7. Spread cool whip over the top of the cake.
8. Place cherries and nuts on top for garnish.
Note: Bake the cake in a large pan and leave it in the pan to keep all the toppings on the cake.
